inputs.label: Breed Maturity Age
inputs.businessContext: Typical age in months when this breed reaches adult size (e.g., small: 9-12, medium: 12-15, large: 18-24).

label_i18n.fr: Âge de maturité de la race
label_i18n.es: Edad de madurez de la raza

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical age in months when this breed reaches adult size (e.g., small: 9-12, medium: 12-15, large: 18-24).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bu ırkın yetişkin boyuta ulaştığı tipik ay cinsinden yaş (örneğin, küçük: 9-12, orta: 12-15, büyük: 18-24).
businessContext_i18n.de: Typisches Alter in Monaten, in dem diese Rasse die Erwachsenengröße erreicht (z. B. klein: 9-12, mittel: 12-15, groß: 18-24).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge typique en mois auquel cette race atteint sa taille adulte (ex. : petit : 9-12, moyen : 12-15, grand : 18-24).
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad típica en meses cuando esta raza alcanza el tamaño adulto (ej., pequeño: 9-12, mediano: 12-15, grande: 18-24).

inputs.label: Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust for individual variation (e.g., 0.9 for smaller, 1.1 for larger).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust for individual variation (e.g., 0.9 for smaller, 1.1 for larger).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel farklılıkları ayarlamak için çarpan (örneğin, daha küçük için 0.9, daha büyük için 1.1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Anpassung an individuelle Abweichungen (z. B. 0,9 für kleinere, 1,1 für größere).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour ajuster la variation individuelle (ex. : 0,9 pour plus petit, 1,1 pour plus grand).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para ajustar por variación individual (ej., 0.9 para más pequeño, 1.1 para más grande).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
